remarks: HIGHEST AND BEST REQUESTED BY 8PM ON TUESDAY 6/30. THANK YOU! Just in time for SUMMER, there is a SPARKLING POOL and communal grills on the beautiful grounds of Candlelight Terrace. COMPLETELY UPDATED 3 bed, 2 bath condo in Candlelight Terrace. Centrally located in the heart of Stamford and within walking distance to Bull's Head, Ridgeway Shopping Center, and Scalzi Park. Not only has the condo been completely updated with a NEW KITCHEN, NEW BATHS, and FRESHLY PAINTED throughout with laminate flooring; it is nice and bright with great views of the park-like property and the adjacent river.  The primary bedroom has an ensuite bath and walk-in closet. The other two bedrooms share the second full bath with a tub. There is also in-unit laundry and a storage unit in the building. Heat and hot water included in the HOA. Plus, access to the deck is right off the main living area allowing for enjoyment of the beautiful grounds. This condo in Candlelight Terrace is a beautiful place to live!
